body:
# All Mobs Hate The SUN

## Description

**All Mobs Hate The Sun** is a Minecraft mod that makes hostile mobs vulnerable to sunlight, causing them to burn during the day with significantly increased damage compared to vanilla mechanics.

### What It Does

**Enhanced Sun Damage**
- All hostile mobs (zombies, skeletons, creepers, etc.) will burn when exposed to direct sunlight
- Sunlight damage is more powerful than vanilla, dealing 6 damage every second instead of the usual 1
- Mobs catch fire for 8 seconds when burning begins
- Damage only occurs during daytime when the sun is visible

**Smart Burning Conditions**
- Mobs only burn when they have clear sky access above them
- Burning is prevented if mobs are in water, wearing helmets, or under shelter
- The system automatically checks for proper lighting conditions and weather

**No Configuration Needed**
- The mod works immediately upon installation with no commands or setup required
- Compatible with existing worlds - just install and hostile mobs will start burning in sunlight
description: Hostile mobs burn in sunlight with increased damage during the day.
title: All Mobs Hate The SUN
